parsed.rationale: The benchmark appears valid and visually concrete. The input montage provides clear, actionable constraints: a layout grid with three aligned top cards, a designated final-callout position, normalized margins and protected footer; a style reference specifying navy/teal/gold palette, all-caps white section band, typography/margins, and protected footer notice; plus a concrete civic seal/logo asset. The gold_turn1 deck visibly instantiates these constraints: both slides use the navy title bar, teal section band, consistent card styling, aligned top-row cards, generous margins, and preserved footer region without overlaps. The gold_final deck preserves the same structure and styling while making an instructed-looking revision: slide 1 adds the gold outlined callout in the specified lower-right area, matching the layout grid note and style reference. No obvious overlaps, margin violations, or arbitrary style contradictions are visible. Minor caveat: the exact three-top-card constraint is most directly realized on slide 1 rather than universally across all slides, but overall compliance is strong and coherent.
